scenario_descriptions.GetScalars: Read the canonical scalar object payload.
scenario_descriptions.CallAdd: Invoke the canonical small numeric method call.
scenario_descriptions.NestedObjectAccess: Traverse a nested object and materialize the nested values.
scenario_descriptions.ConstructGreeter: Construct the canonical remote object and call greet.
scenario_descriptions.CallbackRoundtrip: Round-trip a callback through the remote side.
scenario_descriptions.ObjectArgumentRoundtrip: Pass an object argument with behavior and materialize the reply.
scenario_descriptions.SharedReferenceConsistency: Touch a stable shared remote reference.
scenario_descriptions.ExplicitRelease: Acquire and release explicit remote references.
scenario_descriptions.LargePayloadRoundtrip: Transfer a large canonical payload over the full transport.
scenario_descriptions.DeepObjectGraph: Traverse the canonical deep object graph.
